description: AGENT-EUDR-034 Annual Review Scheduler Agent - Review Cycle Management, Deadline Tracking, Task Management, Multi-Year Comparison, Checklist Progress, Calendar Events, Notifications & System Performance

panels.title: Active Review Cycles
panels.description: Total number of currently active EUDR annual review cycles. These are cycles in 'in_progress' or 'pending_review' state across all commodities and jurisdictions.

panels.title: Cycles by Status
panels.description: Distribution of review cycles across lifecycle statuses: draft, in_progress, pending_review, submitted, completed, cancelled. Helps identify bottlenecks in the review pipeline.

panels.title: Completion Rate
panels.description: Percentage of review cycles that have reached 'completed' status out of all cycles that were due for completion in the current review period. Target is above 90%.

panels.title: Overdue Reviews
panels.description: Number of review cycles that have exceeded their scheduled completion deadline. These require immediate attention and escalation to prevent regulatory non-compliance.

panels.title: Upcoming Deadlines
panels.description: Table of approaching review deadlines with color-coded days-until values. Red indicates less than 7 days, orange 7-14 days, yellow 14-30 days, green more than 30 days remaining.

panels.title: Deadline Compliance Rate
panels.description: Percentage of review cycles that were completed on or before their scheduled deadline. Measures organizational punctuality in meeting EUDR annual review obligations.

panels.title: Submissions by Authority
panels.description: Stacked bar chart showing the number of review submissions grouped by competent authority (EU Member State). Helps track submission distribution across jurisdictions.

panels.title: Late Submissions
panels.description: Count of review submissions that were filed after the regulatory deadline. Late submissions carry penalty risk under EUDR enforcement provisions.

panels.title: Tasks by Type
panels.description: Stacked bar chart showing review tasks broken down by type: data collection, risk assessment, checklist review, stakeholder engagement, document update, and authority submission.

panels.title: Task Completion Rate
panels.description: Time series showing the ratio of completed tasks to total assigned tasks, broken down by task type. Tracks progress velocity across the review cycle.

panels.title: Overdue Tasks
panels.description: Table listing all tasks past their due date with assignee, task type, cycle ID, and days overdue. Color-coded by severity of delay.

panels.title: Task Duration (Avg Days)
panels.description: Histogram distribution of task completion durations in days. Shows how long different task types typically take to complete, helping identify process bottlenecks.

panels.title: Year-over-Year Metrics
panels.description: Comparison of key review metrics (supplier count, plot coverage, compliance score) across 2024, 2025, and 2026 review cycles. Line styles distinguish each year for clear visual comparison.

panels.title: Change Significance
panels.description: Distribution of year-over-year changes by significance level: critical (major regulatory impact), significant (notable shifts), moderate (expected variation), minor (negligible change).

panels.title: Supplier Delta (YoY)
panels.description: Net change in the number of suppliers tracked between the current and previous review year. Positive values indicate supply chain expansion.

panels.title: Plot Delta (YoY)
panels.description: Net change in the number of geolocated production plots between the current and previous review year. Tracks expansion or contraction of monitored land areas.

panels.title: Risk Delta (YoY)
panels.description: Year-over-year change in composite risk score. Negative values (green) indicate risk reduction; positive values (red) indicate deterioration requiring attention.

panels.title: Checklist Completion by Commodity
panels.description: Bar chart showing review checklist completion percentage for each EUDR commodity (cattle, cocoa, coffee, palm oil, rubber, soya, wood). Tracks which commodity reviews are lagging.

panels.title: Article Coverage Heatmap
panels.description: Heatmap showing which EUDR articles (Art. 3-31) have been reviewed per commodity. Darker cells indicate completed reviews; lighter cells indicate pending or partial reviews.

panels.title: Compliance Score Trend
panels.description: Time series of the aggregate compliance score across all active review cycles. Tracks movement toward or away from full EUDR compliance over the review period.

panels.title: Incomplete Checklists
panels.description: Table of review checklists that have not yet reached 100% completion. Sorted by completion percentage ascending to highlight the most incomplete items first.

panels.title: Upcoming Events
panels.description: Timeline-style table of upcoming review calendar events including deadlines, milestones, meetings, reminders, and audits. Sorted by proximity with color-coded urgency.

panels.title: Event Types Distribution
panels.description: Pie chart showing the breakdown of scheduled calendar events by type: deadline, milestone, meeting, reminder, audit. Indicates the composition of the review schedule.

panels.title: Calendar Density (by Month)
panels.description: Heatmap showing the density of scheduled events per month across the review calendar. Identifies peak activity periods and potential scheduling conflicts.

panels.title: Participant Engagement
panels.description: Percentage of assigned review participants who have actively engaged with their tasks (logged actions, submitted updates, attended meetings) during the current review cycle.

panels.title: Notifications Sent (by Channel)
panels.description: Time series of notifications dispatched through each delivery channel: email, Slack, in-app, and SMS. Tracks notification volume and preferred communication paths.

panels.title: Acknowledgment Rate
panels.description: Percentage of sent notifications that received explicit acknowledgment from recipients. Low rates may indicate notification fatigue or delivery issues requiring channel optimization.

panels.title: Escalations Triggered
panels.description: Total number of escalation notifications triggered when review tasks exceed their SLA or participants fail to acknowledge within the configured grace period.

panels.title: Notification Delivery Failures
panels.description: Count of notifications that failed to deliver due to channel errors (bounced emails, API failures, rate limits). High counts indicate integration issues requiring investigation.

panels.title: Cycle Creation Rate
panels.description: Rate of new review cycle creation over time. Spikes typically align with the start of annual review periods or bulk cycle initialization.

panels.title: API Latency
panels.description: Histogram distribution of API request latency for the Annual Review Scheduler endpoints. Helps identify performance degradation and capacity planning needs.

panels.title: Database Query Time
panels.description: Percentile latencies (p50, p95, p99) for database queries executed by the Annual Review Scheduler. Monitors query performance and helps detect slow query regressions.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Overall error rates for the Annual Review Scheduler including API errors (HTTP 5xx), business logic errors, and background task failures. Threshold at 1% warning, 5% critical.

title: EUDR-034 Annual Review Scheduler Agent
